typography.heading_strategy: JetBrains Mono with varying weights. Uppercase for section headers. Tracking tight.

hierarchy.h1: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-white/90
hierarchy.h3: text-base sm:text-lg font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/70
hierarchy.small_labels: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40

surfaces_and_borders.headers: bg-[#050505] border-b border-[#262626] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_borders.inputs: bg-[#121212] border border-[#262626] rounded-none focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 text-white
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#333333] hover:border-cyan-500 hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors rounded-none
surfaces_and_borders.special_effects: Use 1px borders heavily to create 'scanline' or 'blueprint' grid effects. Use inset shadows or drop-shadows with neon colors sparingly for 'active' states.

icons_and_assets.style: duotone or regular, keep it angular/technical
icons_and_assets.notes_on_media: DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. This is a pure data/terminal dashboard. Rely entirely on typography, Phosphor icons, and CSS borders/colors for visual interest.

components_strategy.market_perf_grid: Dense bento grid (e.g., grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-6 inside the container). Each bot is a tiny square with just symbol, color-coded price/status, and minimal padding. Use border-collapse style.
components_strategy.god_overview: Elevated visual hierarchy. Use Gold/Yellow accents. The 'Golden Rules' should look like terminal system prompts (e.g., '> TARGET: 90% WR').
components_strategy.supervisor_status: List or 2-column grid. Each supervisor shows their engine count and active status. Use glowing dot indicators (w/ animate-pulse).
components_strategy.open_closed_positions: Tabular layout. No rounded corners on rows. Zebra striping with #0A0A0A and #121212. Mono-spaced numbers meticulously aligned right.
components_strategy.hell_log: Terminal output style. Red text (`text-rose-500`). Use typewriter effect or simple static list with timestamp `[14:02:44] BOT_WIPED: SOL-USD`.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle border color change (e.g., hover:border-white/40). Buttons should have sharp, immediate transitions.
motion_and_interaction.active_data: Use 'animate-pulse' on a small colored dot to indicate live data feeds.
motion_and_interaction.loading: ASCII spinners (/, -, \, |) or flashing block cursors instead of standard circular spinners.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Keep animations under 200ms. Snappy and mechanical.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against #0A0A0A meets >4.5:1 ratio. Muted text must not drop below #666666.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements and key data points MUST have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='bot-status-btc'`, `data-testid='god-wr-metric'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY `JetBrains Mono` for the entire application. Apply it globally in Tailwind.
No rounded corners anywhere (`rounded-none`). This is a rigid, terminal-style interface.
Implement the 3-column layout strictly using the CSS Grid definitions provided.
Do NOT add any stock photos or placeholder images. Use pure data, CSS, and typography to build the aesthetic.
Build the 'Hell Log' with a stark, red-tinted terminal console look.
For the 48 bots grid (MarketPerfGrid), make it extremely dense. Pack the information tightly like a Bloomberg terminal.
Ensure the header displays 'God' level metrics prominently.
